name: Raisin Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare cookie sheets with oil or spray.
2. In a blender, blend sweet milk, dates, vanilla, egg, and mashed fruit on low until uniform.
3. Add the mixture to oatmeal in a bowl and stir with a spoon. Let set for about 5 minutes to moisten the oatmeal.
4. Meanwhile, in a large mixing bowl, combine flours, baking powder, salt, and spices.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Add the oat mixture to the dry ingredients and mix well.
7. Add raisins and stir.
8. Drop teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from the pan, cool, and store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Freezes well.
Sweet Milk:
2 cups reconstituted nonfat milk (could use fresh nonfat or soy or rice milk)
2/3 cup raisins
Combine milk and raisins in a jar, cover, and refrigerate at least overnight, best for 3 days.
Strain milk to remove raisins which will become mushy and flat.
